commit_scope: Intrinsic casting lands as Form tissue: a CAST ontology category (type 98 — 11 cast pairs + 5 TYPE-* typed-token cells), a cast surface (intrinsic-cast.fk) whose bodies are pure Form wherever the math allows, nothing-on-failure semantics (TrivNull 1.1.4.0 — the core-axioms third state), reversibility/lossiness/totality as data, a static cast-check resolution walk over Blueprint coordinates, and the TS lifter consulting the dialect coercion row to emit explicit CAST nodes for mixed string+int '+'. Both lanes proven three-way.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/typescript-bmf.fk form-stdlib/intrinsic-cast.fk form-stdlib/typescript-bmf-eval.fk form-stdlib/typescript-bmf-lift.fk form-stdlib/tests/intrinsic-cast-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/intrinsic-cast.fk form-stdlib/tests/intrinsic-cast-check-band.fk
cd form && <ten grammar-coupled regression suites + both existing TS BMF bands, prelude chains from their headers>
local_validation.summary: intrinsic-cast-band 7070915/7070915 three-way (15 value casts, 9 law/row-data checks, 7 nothing-failure cells incl. nothing-propagation through a chained cast tree, 7 recipe-layer cells incl. content-addressed cast nodes, recipe-level round-trip, and the lifted TS coercion: '"n=" + 5' -> EVAL-CONCAT with an explicit CAST-INT-STRING child -> "n=5", both operand orders). intrinsic-cast-check-band 11111111/11111111 three-way (clean cast and clean round-trip chain report zero diagnostics; cast-from-mismatch, lossy-step on a lossy INNER step, nothing-unhandled on math consumers of partial casts — two partial casts give two diagnostics; static types read from Blueprint coordinates; a tree whose value-walk yields nothing still checks statically). Regression: ten grammar-coupled suites + typescript-bmf-eval-band (28000) + typescript-bmf-lift-band (55000) unchanged — the eval/lift integration is lazy (inline type-98 coordinate test), so workloads that never walk CAST nodes need no new prelude. Notable composition choices: string->float is pure Form over the str_to_int leaf, which closed the TS kernel's missing str_to_float without adding a native; float->string is a canonical Form-side formatter so the kernels agree by construction; str_to_int's silent-zero failure is composted behind Form-side digit validation that returns nothing (TrivNull) instead.

observed_delta.new_ontology: top-level casts block (type 98, TYPE-* 1-5, pairs 10-20) + typescript.bmf coercions row + TS-BMF 636/637
observed_delta.smoke: ts-bmf-run-expr-text '"n=" + 5' -> "n=5" on Go, Rust, TS with CAST node visible in the lifted tree

known_limitations.limitation: string->float parses decimal form only (optional sign, digits, optional . with digits) — no exponent notation yet; float->string is fixed 6-fractional-digit canonical form, declared lossy.
known_limitations.follow_up: Exponent form and a round-trip-faithful formatter ride the format-arith numerics lane when a consumer needs them.

known_limitations.limitation: Lift-time string-typing reads leaf/cast/concat categories — nested expressions whose string-ness is only knowable through idents stay on the math path.
known_limitations.follow_up: The cast-check static walk generalizes to lift-time type inference when statement lifting lands.

known_limitations.limitation: Python BMF lifter does not yet consult the coercion table (truthiness in if/while).
known_limitations.follow_up: Same lift-plus-node shape, python-bmf-lift.fk, next slice.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run kernel parity three-way.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib rides the api rebuild; no route changes.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route changes. Primitive type movement is now an explicit, content-addressed recipe shape: failed casts realize to nothing instead of silent zeros, dialect coercion is lift-time data instead of kernel branches, and cast chains are statically checkable without execution.
test_flows: Two new bands three-way across Go/Rust/TS kernels; ten grammar-coupled suites + two existing TS BMF bands regression-green.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh exit 0 on both new band workloads and all regression workloads.

phase_gate.gate: Both cast lanes (value-walk + resolution-walk) proven three-way with the lifted TS coercion case
phase_gate.next: Python BMF truthiness coercion; statement lifting; m4e4 str_*/float families carry casts onto the fourth kernel
